title: salvia aegyptiaca var. pumila
intro: Salvia aegyptiaca var. pumila, also known as dwarf Egyptian sage, is a perennial plant in the Lamiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Salvia aegyptiaca var. pumila include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Salvia aegyptiaca var. pumila can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to support overall well-being and immune function.
